name: Geometry Goal Dash 2026
description: Geometry Goal Dash 2026 is a fast-paced platformer inspired by Geometry Dash, where you control a rolling ball through challenging levels full of traps, jumps, and tight timing. Use arrow keys or WASD to guide your movement, avoid deadly obstacles, and survive intense levels that get harder the further you go. But there’s a twist… Ronaldo is hunting you! Stay fast, stay precise, and don’t let him catch you as you dash through chaotic football-themed worlds. Can you survive the ultimate mix of platforming skill and football madness?
instructions: WAD or Arrow keys to play
